summary: Classified the PR inventory shard independently. No shared canonical is selected, no security-sensitive refs were detected, and no GitHub mutations are planned because close, merge, fix, and low-signal closeout paths are disabled or blocked by review/proof gates. Closed PRs are kept closed as historical context; open PRs remain open, with needs_human scoped to PRs requiring maintainer or technical correctness judgment.
